name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup blanched almonds, lightly toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. Combine the chocolate wafer crumbs, blanched almonds, sugar, and butter in a bowl. Press the mixture into the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. In another bowl, beat together the cream cheese, sugar, heavy cream, Amaretto liqueur, and vanilla extract until smooth. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Beat the mixture until it is light and creamy.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared springform pan. Bake in the center of the oven for 1 1/2 hours or until a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean.
5. Let the cake stand on a rack for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the sour cream, remaining vanilla extract, and sugar. Mix well and spread evenly over the cooled cake.
7. Return the cake to the oven and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a rack. Wrap loosely with wax paper and chill in the refrigerator overnight.
9. When ready to serve, remove the sides of the pan and garnish the top with toasted almonds around the outer edge and on top of the cake.
